data.title: Helium Evolution Nears Completion of Soda Lake Facility
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Helium Evolution Incorporated ( (TSE:HEVI) ) has provided an announcement.

Helium Evolution Incorporated has announced that its Soda Lake Facility, a joint project with North American Helium Incorporated, is nearing completion with over 95% of construction finished. The facility, designed to process 12 million standard cubic feet of raw gas per day, will be supplied by three helium wells through a dedicated pipeline system. The company holds a 20% working interest in the facility, representing a $5.3 million investment, which is fully funded by a recent $8.3 million convertible note issuance. The startup of the purification facility and connected wells is on track for early in the fourth quarter of 2025, marking a significant step in Helium Evolution’s strategy to supply the growing helium market.

Spark’s Take on TSE:HEVI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:HEVI is a Neutral.

Helium Evolution’s financial performance remains a major concern, with continued losses and no revenue. Despite some positive technical indicators and strategic corporate events suggesting potential for future growth, the company’s valuation remains unattractive without earnings and dividends. Strong equity and strategic partnerships are positive, but operational improvements are necessary for a higher score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:HEVI stock, click here.

More about Helium Evolution Incorporated

Helium Evolution Incorporated is a Canadian-based helium exploration company with the largest helium land rights position in North America among publicly-traded companies. The company focuses on developing assets in southern Saskatchewan, holding over five million acres of land near proven helium discoveries. Helium Evolution aims to become a leading supplier of sustainably-produced helium for the global market.

Average Trading Volume: 46,010

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For detailed information about HEVI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Perspective Therapeutics Appoints Joel Sendek as CFO
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Perspective Therapeutics ( (CATX) ) is now available.

On September 2, 2025, Perspective Therapeutics appointed Joel Sendek as Chief Financial Officer, effective September 4, 2025, succeeding Juan Graham. Mr. Sendek brings over 30 years of experience in life sciences, having served as CFO at multiple biotech companies and as a senior equity research analyst. His appointment is seen as a strategic move to advance Perspective’s clinical programs and establish leadership in the targeted alpha radiopharmaceutical field, as the company progresses with its innovative cancer treatment platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (CATX) stock is a Buy with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Perspective Therapeutics stock, see the CATX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CATX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CATX is a Neutral.

Perspective Therapeutics is facing severe operational challenges with no revenue and increasing net losses, which significantly impact its financial performance score. While the company’s balance sheet shows some strength due to low leverage, the reliance on external financing raises sustainability concerns. The technical analysis indicates ongoing downward pressure, and the negative P/E ratio reflects severe valuation concerns. Overall, the stock’s prospects are weak, requiring strategic turnaround efforts to improve its outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on CATX stock, click here.

More about Perspective Therapeutics

Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. is a radiopharmaceutical development company focused on pioneering advanced treatments for cancers throughout the body. The company utilizes proprietary technology with the alpha-emitting isotope 212Pb to target cancer cells and is developing complementary imaging diagnostics to personalize treatment and optimize outcomes. Their clinical programs include neuroendocrine tumor, melanoma, and solid tumor trials, and they are expanding their network of drug product finishing facilities.

The latest announcement is out from Mare Engineering Group SpA ( (IT:MARE) ).

Mare Group S.p.A. has become the largest shareholder of Eles, a leader in semiconductor testing, and aims to create a national hub generating around €100 million in revenues. The company plans to strengthen its position in semiconductors, defense, aerospace, and digital AI sectors by proposing the expansion of Eles’s Board of Directors with three new directors to enhance its ability to face global challenges and foster growth.

Founded in 2001, Mare Group is an engineering company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, focusing on proprietary technology platforms. It serves over 2,000 clients with a team of more than 500 people across 25 offices in five countries. The company is a significant player in the innovation ecosystem, having made 16 acquisitions since 2019 to expand its product portfolio and market presence.

data.title: Ingevity Sells Refinery to Mainstream Pine for $110M
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Ingevity ( (NGVT) ) is now available.

On September 4, 2025, Ingevity Corporation announced an agreement to sell its North Charleston crude tall oil refinery and the majority of its Industrial Specialties product line to Mainstream Pine Products for $110 million in cash, with potential additional contingent payments. This transaction aims to reduce portfolio volatility, strengthen Ingevity’s margin and cash flow profile, and enhance strategic flexibility. The sale is expected to close by early 2026 and will not impact Ingevity’s Road Technologies product line. The agreement includes various operational and supply arrangements between Ingevity and Mainstream, ensuring continuity and mutual benefits for both parties.

The most recent analyst rating on (NGVT) stock is a Hold with a $60.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ingevity stock, see the NGVT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NGVT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NGVT is a Neutral.

Ingevity’s overall stock score reflects a mix of financial challenges and strong technical momentum. The company’s financial performance is under pressure due to high leverage and negative margins, but the technical indicators show bullish momentum. The positive sentiment from the earnings call, with improved guidance and strategic execution, also contributes positively to the score. However, the negative valuation metrics weigh down the overall attractiveness.

To see Spark’s full report on NGVT stock, click here.

More about Ingevity

Ingevity Corporation operates in the specialty chemicals industry, providing products and technologies that purify, protect, and enhance the environment. The company is involved in three segments: Performance Materials, Advanced Polymer Technologies, and Performance Chemicals, with applications in adhesives, agrochemicals, asphalt paving, and more. Headquartered in North Charleston, South Carolina, Ingevity operates globally and employs approximately 1,600 people.

data.title: Foran Mining Unveils Promising Drill Results at Tesla Zone
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Foran Mining ( (TSE:FOM) ).

Foran Mining Corporation has announced successful results from its 2025 winter-spring drill program at the Tesla and Bridge Zones within its McIlvenna Bay Project. The drilling confirmed mineralization across multiple areas, with significant copper, zinc, gold, and silver values, highlighting a growing precious metals opportunity. The Tesla Zone has been defined over a 1.35 km strike and remains open for further exploration, indicating its potential for expansion. The results are expected to support a maiden resource estimate, enhancing the company’s long-term growth prospects and positioning within the mining sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:FOM) stock is a Buy with a C$4.75 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Foran Mining stock, see the TSE:FOM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:FOM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:FOM is a Neutral.

Foran Mining’s overall stock score is influenced by significant financial difficulties due to the lack of revenue generation and negative cash flow, which undermine its financial stability. Despite these challenges, recent corporate events suggest growth potential, particularly with the McIlvenna Bay project. However, the current valuation and technical indicators present challenges, with negative momentum and unfavorable P/E ratio. The company’s reliance on financing activities and absence of profitability are key risks, though recent developments in their projects offer some hope for future improvement.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:FOM stock, click here.

More about Foran Mining

Foran Mining Corporation is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is engaged in the extraction of copper, zinc, gold, and silver, with a significant market focus on expanding its mineral resource base in the McIlvenna Bay Project located in east-central Saskatchewan.

The company is progressing with Phase 2 trials for its lead candidate, tibulizumab, with anticipated results in 2026, and has sufficient cash reserves to fund operations through 2027, positioning itself as a key player in addressing unmet medical needs in immune-mediated diseases.

Zura Bio Limited operates in the biotechnology industry, focusing on developing dual-pathway biologic candidates for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. The company is advancing its lead product candidate, tibulizumab, which targets IL-17A and BAFF, through global Phase 2 studies.
